expectations.text: Uses kind: arrow_function in the rule
expectations.evidence: Rule uses kind: arrow_function as root criterion

expectations.text: Uses a composite rule (all/any/not) to filter for single-expression bodies
expectations.evidence: Uses not: has: field: body, kind: statement_block — composite rule to exclude block-body arrows

expectations.text: Demonstrates understanding of AST-node-based matching vs text matching
expectations.evidence: Uses kind-based matching (arrow_function) and field-based filtering (field: body) — pure AST matching, not text
